action.description:
Introduced by Senators Pfaff, Keyeski, Larson, Roys, Hesselbein, Spreitzer, Smith and Dassler-Alfheim; 
cosponsored by Representatives Hong, McCarville, Brown, Sheehan, Anderson, Clancy, Stroud, Udell, Roe, Andraca, Arney, Bare, Palmeri, Stubbs, Joers, Vining, Miresse, Hysell, Sinicki, DeSmidt and Tenorio
